title: Referencing SystemVerilog struct field of a member of an array of structs

features.name: struct field access via variable-indexed array element
features.description: Code should include struct field access on an array element indexed by a loop variable, where the struct is packed and the array is used as a module port signal

features.name: packed struct array as module output port
features.description: Code should include a module output port that is an array of packed structs with a parameter-specified size
